q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(...) which is a filesystem write operation that can create directories anywhere due to path traversal.

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact path string passed to mkdir to verify if it escapes BASE_EXPORT_DIR via traversal sequences.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: No-op or simulate successful directory creation without touching the real filesystem.
notes: Mocking mkdir prevents irreversible filesystem modifications in the test environment.
The return value of mkdir is None, so the fake behavior only needs to avoid raising exceptions to allow execution to continue to the JsonResponse.
